mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_definition (api_name, api_path, api_method, protocol, content_type, description, request_example, response_example, status, is_require_auth, rate_limit, timeout, created_by) VALUES (#{apiName}, #{apiPath}, #{apiMethod}, #{protocol}, #{contentType}, #{description}, #{requestExample}, #{responseExample}, #{status}, #{isRequireAuth}, #{rateLimit}, #{timeout}, #{createdBy})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM api_definition WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE api_definition SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_auth_config (api_id, auth_name, app_key, app_secret, auth_type, allowed_ips, expire_time, status, description, created_by) VALUES (#{apiId}, #{authName}, #{appKey}, #{appSecret}, #{authType}, #{allowedIps}, #{expireTime}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdBy})

INSERT INTO api_call_log (api_id, auth_id, request_path, request_method, request_params, request_headers, response_code, response_body, client_ip, execution_time, is_success, error_message) VALUES (#{apiId}, #{authId}, #{requestPath}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestParams}, #{requestHeaders}, #{responseCode}, #{responseBody}, #{clientIp}, #{executionTime}, #{isSuccess}, #{errorMessage})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCalls, SUM(CASE WHEN is_success = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCalls, SUM(CASE WHEN is_success = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedCalls, COALESCE(AVG(execution_time), 0) AS avgResponseTime FROM api_call_log
AND created_at >= #{startTime} AND created_at <= #{endTime}
